name: chart/sparkline
description: Compact inline sparkline for embedding trend data in dashboards or KPI cards.

meta.name: Sparkline
meta.description: Compact inline sparkline for embedding trend data in dashboards or KPI cards.

props.name: endDot
props.description: Show dot at last data point

examples.title: Inline sparkline
examples.code:
import { Sparkline } from '@cascivo/charts'

<Sparkline data={[10, 20, 15, 30, 25]} label="Trend" endDot />

whenToUse: Embedding a compact micro-trend inline in text, tables, or KPI cards
Conveying direction at a glance where a full chart would be too large
whenNotToUse: Reading precise values or axes are needed — use LineChart
As a standalone primary chart with its own panel

related.name: LineChart
related.reason: Use as a full chart when axes and tooltips are needed

related.name: Kpi
related.reason: Commonly embedded inside a KPI card as a trend indicator

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a label prop for screen reader labeling.
